rules.escalation: Extend the existing subsystem instead of rebuilding the idea from scratch.
rules.statement: If the live repo already has a subsystem that satisfies the blueprint, prefer extending it.

rules.escalation: Use XI evidence to converge duplicate or overlapping implementations before future work starts.
rules.statement: If duplicate implementations exist, route through XI-series convergence logic first.

rules.escalation: Update docs, registries, or blueprint assumptions so the code and plan agree again.
rules.statement: If documentation contradicts code, code is authoritative until reconciled.

rules.escalation: Mark the blueprint assumption as post-snapshot-required and derive a repo-specific replacement strategy.
rules.statement: If the blueprint assumes a module boundary not present in repo, mark it as post-snapshot-required.

rules.escalation: Extend the existing subsystem instead of rebuilding the idea from scratch.
rules.statement: Never invent new modules if an existing module can be extended safely.

rules.escalation: Create a manual review packet and stop implementation planning until the ambiguity is resolved.
rules.statement: If uncertain, quarantine and escalate to manual review.
